nodes.name: ROLLUP - trust.js (computeTrustRollup)
nodes.notes: SOURCE OF TRUTH: lib/f05/trust.js -- do not edit here, edit there and re-paste (via n8n/build-f05-workflow.py). No LLM call anywhere in this node.

parameters.content:
### SCOPE = SS8.1's THREE OR'D ROUTES
`cards` matching application_id, OR company_id, OR a
founder on this company (unrestricted superset) -- then
`claim_trust` by card_id. lib/f05/trust.js's own
scopeClaimsToApplication() applies route 3's company_id
restriction inside ROLLUP, not here.

### ZERO LLM -- THE ROLLUP IS A SELECT (design.md SS6.0b)
ROLLUP (`lib/f05/trust.js`, pasted verbatim) is pure
arithmetic over `score_formulas.config` -- coverage,
value and confidence, all derived from claim_trust's
already-computed per-claim numbers. Below `min_coverage`:
NO scores row, one `trust_rollup_insufficient_evidence`
event instead -- absence is not zero (design.md SS14).
